hypotheses.summary: Turn an important prose-only keep-or-revert guardrail into an executable helper.
hypotheses.notes: Best when the repo already describes the rule clearly but still applies it manually.
related_patterns: prefer explicit scoring rules over opaque overall scores
related_prevention_rules: Before keeping a candidate state, compare it against the current best iteration with explicit guardrails instead of relying only on an informal prose judgment.

hypotheses.summary: Try a more exploratory helper or heuristic when recent kept iterations have gone flat.
hypotheses.notes: Useful when loop-state review says the current search is plateauing.
related_patterns: review loop state before spending another iteration

hypotheses.summary: Stabilize a flaky workflow edge before attempting a broader optimization.
hypotheses.notes: Prefer this when recent failures suggest the loop needs a cleaner foundation first.
related_prevention_rules: Promote ledger learnings into patterns.md through an explicit deduped review step instead of copying notes across memory layers by hand.
